title: FMD - Both earbuds disconnected
scenario: Both earbuds disconnected: Open Lens app with Osprey device disconnected, navigate to Find My Device, and verify Osprey is recognized as 3 devices (Case, Left, Right) all showing disconnected, while Tern is recognized as 2 devices (no case) with only earbuds visible on headset card.
steps: Open Lens app with Osprey device disconnected.
Tap on App Settings icon (hamburger icon).
expected: Osprey device is recognized on the map as 3 devices (Case, Left, Right). All three show as disconnected. Note: Tern device is recognized as 2 devices (no case), only earbuds visible on headset card.
